2237280.name: Wild Growth TD
2237280.description:
Grow out your defenses and defend against waves of invasive enemies. Manage resources, explore further out into the wilds, and strengthen your grove. Wild Growth TD combines tower defense with real time strategy and rogue-lite elements.

Key Features


  • Multiple game modes
  • Randomly Generated Maps
  • Endless Replayability
  • Customizable Unlocks and Loadouts
2237280.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
